purpose: Identify and explain the positions of key stakeholders — who is involved, what they want, and how they are affected.
writingRules: Each stakeholder must be named and their interest explained
Include quotes from stakeholders where available
Show power dynamics — who has influence, who is affected without power
Include stakeholders who are affected but not represented
Update stakeholder positions if they change over time
seoRules: Use Person and Organization schema for named stakeholders
Quotes should use Quote schema markup
Stakeholder names should appear as natural text, not lists
